vision_report.narrative_description: The biome is currently in a state of total vegetative collapse. All registered specimens (P1-P4) are missing from their respective containers. The soil surfaces are bare, and the only notable change in the 5-day sequence is the introduction of a white cylindrical object in the yellow pot area. The white rabbit anchor in P3 remains as a static marker in an otherwise empty environment.
